metadata.name: Solar Panel Supply Chain Traceability Check

description: A compliance manager must verify that a shipment of solar panels does not use materials from regions with forced labor concerns, as per company policy.

nodes.task_description: Retrieve the bill of materials and list of sub-suppliers for the given solar panel model from the manufacturer.

expected_outcome.value: Agent obtains the complete supply chain documentation.

nodes.task_description: Cross-reference the list of sub-suppliers and material origins against a database of prohibited entities and regions.

expected_outcome.value: Agent finds no matches with the prohibited list.

nodes.task_description: Generate a compliance certificate confirming the supply chain has been vetted and approved.

expected_outcome.value: Agent produces a formal compliance document for internal records.
